# Ashish Sinha — Enterprise AI Product Leader & Strategic Advisor

> Portfolio of a senior AI product leader and advisor focused on arbitrage judgement — what to build, what to kill, what to sequence — across enterprise AI portfolios. Studio of live products, execution dashboard, operating manual, architecture framework, experience timeline, and writing.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Full portfolio with operator's instinct, studio, execution dashboard, expertise, operating manual, architecture, experience, skills, articles, working philosophy, and contact.

## Studio (live products)

- [Baseline AI](https://baseline-ai-psi.lovable.app/): Live product from the studio.
- [Horizon GTM](https://horizon-gtm.lovable.app/): Live product from the studio.
- [Semantic Reconciliation Engine](https://the-semantic-reconciliation-engine.lovable.app/): Live product from the studio.

## Articles

- [Deciding What Not to Build](/writing/what-not-to-build): The most senior call in enterprise AI — recognising which initiative isn't ready for its data, org, or risk envelope yet.
- [The Economics Nobody Models](/writing/economics-of-a-genai-initiative): What a GenAI initiative actually costs at scale — token economics, model-tier arbitrage, and run-cost modelling before deployment.
- [The 80/40 Rule](/writing/80-40-rule): Why high-signal imperfection beats slow enterprise roadmaps.

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of public routes.
